title: pilosella mexicana
intro: Pilosella mexicana, also known as Mexican hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its health benefits, such as antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. Pilosella mexicana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
